description: Professional plumbing services for repairs, installations, and emergencies across the local area.

leak repair.advice: Try turning off the water supply to prevent further damage.
leak repair.quote_notes: Dripping tap or washer replacement is around £80. Visible pipe leak under a sink or behind a toilet is £90-100. Leak inside a wall or under the floor will be toward £120 or more depending on access.

boiler repair.advice: Check pressure levels and reset the boiler if needed.
boiler repair.quote_notes: Boiler reset or pressure top-up is £90. Faulty thermostat or valve replacement is £110-140. If a part needs ordering or the issue is a heat exchanger, it can reach £180+.

blocked drain.advice: Avoid using chemical drain cleaners as they can damage pipes.
blocked drain.quote_notes: Simple sink or bath blockage cleared with a rod is £60-70. Toilet blockage is around £70-80. Main drain or outdoor drain blockage requiring jetting is £90-100.
